title: Canada availability signals
detail: Health Canada submissions, NACI review status, and provincial/public funding signals are often harder to track than FDA/EMA milestones. Add a Canada-specific watchlist tab and a saved query for product monographs and NACI updates.

title: Older-adult comparative effectiveness
detail: Prioritize test-negative and hospitalization studies comparing new candidates with high-dose, adjuvanted, recombinant, and standard-dose vaccines in adults ≥65 and long-term care residents.

title: B-lineage immunogenicity and strain alignment
detail: Several mRNA programmes have highlighted strain-by-strain performance questions. Track B/Victoria responses, trivalent composition changes, and implications of B/Yamagata removal.

title: Correlates beyond HAI
detail: Capture neuraminidase inhibition, T-cell, mucosal IgA, breadth, durability, and immune-imprinting evidence, especially for mRNA and conserved-antigen candidates.

title: Combination vaccine safety/reactogenicity
detail: Map safety data separately for coformulated COVID-19 + influenza vaccines versus same-day coadministration of separate licensed products.

title: Paediatric and pregnancy evidence
detail: Near-term candidates emphasize adults ≥50. Track whether new platforms expand to children, pregnant people, and immunocompromised populations.
